scripts.fonts: mkdir -p assets/fonts && cp node_modules/@fontsource-variable/inter/files/inter-latin-standard-normal.woff2 assets/fonts/ && cp node_modules/@fontsource-variable/inter/files/inter-latin-ext-standard-normal.woff2 assets/fonts/ && cp node_modules/@fontsource-variable/jetbrains-mono/files/jetbrains-mono-latin-wght-normal.woff2 assets/fonts/ && cp node_modules/@fontsource-variable/jetbrains-mono/files/jetbrains-mono-latin-ext-wght-normal.woff2 assets/fonts/
scripts.assets: npm run alpine && npm run basecoat && npm run htmx && npm run fonts
scripts.clean: node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; fs.rmSync('_site', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.build: npm run clean &&  npm run css && npx @11ty/eleventy
